notes: v0.16.48 — PRACTICE: SIDE PICKER layout. Left rail with 3 mode rows (compact animated preview + name + sub + desc), right detail card with the selected mode's full animated arena + RULES bullet list + a brief footer holding the difficulty chips and START MATCH button. ARENA preview: 2 ships orbit a hex arena, fire at each other, HP bars, KO triggers explosion + reset. CAPTURE preview: BASTION rushes for the gold orb at centre, picks it up, orbits with it; LANCE circles the perimeter and shoots at the holder — a hit drops the orb back to centre. PAINT preview: matches the in-game behaviour — killing the opponent leaves a paint SPLASH at the death location coloured by the killer; splashes accumulate and fade over ~12s, with a kill counter at the top. Windows only.
